name: Alien slug parasite (Female POV)

Story

Your space faring crew is hiding from a kill squad on an alien planet. While bathing in a river, you are approached by a parasite looking for a host.

Notice

First page of the alien tag lets go!

Holy hell this bot blew up! I can't believe this is one of if not my most popular bot. Strike that, this IS my most popular bot. I don't know how I feel about this being my top bot

PUBLIC CHATS. MAKE EM. I absolutely love all the weird shit ya'll are doing with this bot lol.

First female only bot ay lmao.

I had a really hard time getting this to work. I remade the scenario 3 times before I got one that *sometimes* works. It's supposed to enter your yahoo and go all the way to the baby chamber. Sometimes it does other stuff, so just saying that's how it's supposed to go. Any tips on how to make it act more consistently is appreciated. When it does work though it works well.

Image AI generated.

I'm glad so many people are enjoying this bot. When I first made it I thought it would be a stinker but I guess I was wrong lol.
